description_long: This is a round, multi-layered cake with a rich chocolate ganache dripping over the sides and a creamy filling visible between the layers. The top is lavishly decorated with slices of strawberries, kiwis, and oranges, arranged in a circular pattern around a generous swirl of whipped cream. Two chocolate wafer sticks are inserted into the whipped cream at the center, adding height and visual interest. The cake sits on a faceted, lavender-colored plate that contrasts with the warm tones of the cake. The overall appearance is festive and inviting, suitable for celebrations or display in a bakery window. The textures of the fruit, cream, and ganache are distinct and visually appealing.
description: A round, multi-layered cake with chocolate ganache, fruit slices, whipped cream, and wafer sticks, displayed on a lavender plate. The cake is richly decorated and visually festive.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chocolate ganache dripping over the side, with strawberries, kiwis, and oranges arranged on top, and two wafer sticks in the whipped cream center.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the fruit arrangement and the height of the whipped cream swirl, with the chocolate ganache and plate edge clearly visible.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the layered structure of the cake and the even distribution of fruit and cream decorations.
description_view_3: This view shows the back side of the cake, with the fruit and whipped cream still prominent, and the plate's faceted edge visible.
attribute_decoration_style: drip with fruit and whipped cream
